title: Astonish White Jasmine & Basil Bathroom Cleaner Spray, 750ml, Cruelty-free, Vegan
features: Tough on Dirt: This powerful bathroom cleaner spray targets soap scum, watermarks and limescale in one quick spray; leaving your room smelling floral and fabulous whilst banishing germs and dirt
Works Fast: Time can be limited, but not to worry as this spray bottle has been designed to get to work in just 2 minutes, allowing you to get on with more important things

Fresh Scent: Take in the beautiful aromas of white jasmine and basil as they complement each other perfectly to create a fresh and clean fragrance; perfect when expecting guests or to keep your bathroom in tip top shape
Multi-functional: One bottle that does a lot — perfect to use on chrome fittings, taps and shower heads to remove stubborn limescale, dirt and limescale in a flash
Vegan: Here at Astonish, we care about our impact and the environment, that’s why all of our products are vegan and cruelty-free
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Achieve a clean floral fresh bathroom with the help from this powerful bathroom cleaner spray. Infused with a White Jasmine and Basil scent, this spray will banish unwanted dirt and limescale leaving your bathroom sparkling clean. Plus, it gets to work in just 2 minutes — perfect for when you have unexpected guests, or to help keep up with busy lifestyles. Astonish have also created this bathroom spray with natural oils, so you don’t need to worry about harsh chemicals. How to use: Spray onto the surface. Leave for 1-2 minutes and wipe with a clean damp cloth, or rinse with water. For larger surfaces and to remove heavy limescale deposits use a cloth or sponge. Repeat as necessary. Note: DO NOT use on marble, enamel baths, limestone and porous surfaces. Try the Astonish Cream Cleaner for these surfaces. Ingredients <5%, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Preservatives (Reaction mass of Chloromethylisothiazolinone and Methylisothiazolinone) Directions PLEASE NOTE: Product packaging may vary as we update across our products. Manufacturer Contact Information UK: The London Oil Refining Company Ltd., Bradford, BD3 7AF. EU/IE: Astonish Cleaners Europe Ltd, Dublin, Republic of Ireland, K67 E0A2. See more
